description_long: This is a visually robust, tactical-style rifle featuring a large cylindrical drum magazine, likely designed for high-capacity ammunition storage. The body is constructed from a matte, dark metal with a utilitarian, industrial finish, and the handguard is perforated with ventilation holes for heat dissipation. The grip and foregrip are ergonomically shaped with angular, textured surfaces for improved handling. The rifle is equipped with basic iron sights mounted along the top rail, and the barrel is relatively short, ending with a simple, unadorned muzzle. The overall design suggests a focus on functionality and durability, suitable for urban combat or law enforcement scenarios.
description: A tactical rifle with a large drum magazine, matte dark metal body, and ergonomic grips, featuring iron sights and a perforated handguard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, large drum magazine, ergonomic grips, and perforated handguard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, iron sight alignment, and the width of the drum magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the drum magazine, grip, and the overall compactness of the rifle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the sight alignment, rear grip, and the circular profile of the drum magazine.
